requirement_summary: Local read-only FastAPI dashboard on 127.0.0.1:8090 surfacing four panes (bot health, equity+drawdown, trade table, performance metrics) for the running MT5 paper-trading bot. Reads existing artifacts only — no bot-runtime changes, no new pip deps, no LAN exposure.

phase_1_5.notes: Plan-Review folded into plan.md Section D. Self-review pass=true.

phase_2.notes: Context map folded into plan.md Section A. Primary files all read this session.

phase_3.notes: No infra surface; baseline 551 tests to be confirmed by operator before merge.

phase_4_5.notes: Code-path verification complete; 31 new tests collected (7+6+7+11). Operator must run `python -m pytest -q` to physically execute and confirm 551 + 31 = 582 passing.

phase_5.notes: Final review APPROVE. All hard constraints honoured. 0 existing files modified. Manual smoke matrix documented for operator.

phase_6.reason: no infrastructure files changed (no *.tf / docker-compose / k8s/ / Dockerfile)

phase_6_5.reason: branch state not in scope — operator handles branch via own workflow

escalations.summary: Requirement quoted trades.csv columns as side/pnl/entry/exit; actual schema uses type/profit/open_price/close_price. Logged in intake-validation.md and applied to all downstream code.
escalations.resolution: No user blocker — orchestrator corrected automatically; documented for traceability.
